children.statusText: (no status line found)
children.description: These courses were taken outside of your undergraduate career and do not count toward your degree.

requirementGroups.title: Notes/Restrictions/Limitations
requirementGroups.description: 1. The information contained in this analysis should be used to guide you. 2. It should not take the place of consultation with an academic counselor in the Silver Center, Room 905. 3. You are responsible for checking the Bulletin and with your advisor to make sure you are following all school policies. 4. Should there be any errors in this report, please discuss them with your advisor during your next advising appointment. 5. See appropriate department for evaluation of transfer credit that may be applicable to your major/minor. Please expand the areas below to view limits on the Pass/Fail option, credit from outside CAS, possible course exclusions, and the time allowed to complete your degree.

children.title: Pass/Fail Option
children.statusText: (no status line found)
children.description: A. No more than 32 units may be taken with the pass/fail grade option. B. Pass/fail grade option may not be selected for major, minor, or courses taken to satisfy the College Core Curriculum. C. Students may elect one pass/fail option each term.

children.title: Maximum Credit from Other Schools
children.statusText: Satisfied: No more than 16 units may be taken outside of CAS (including transfer work).

children.title: Time Limit
children.statusText: (no status line found)
children.description: All requirements must be met within a period of 8 years from the date of matriculation.

requirementGroups.title: Graduation Requirements
requirementGroups.statusText: Satisfied: Complete the minimum requirements for graduation. In addition to the requirements below, students must
requirementGroups.description: complete their last 32 units while enrolled at CAS.

children.title: Minimum Credits for Graduation
children.statusText: Satisfied: Complete a minimum of 128 credits.

children.title: Computer Science: Required Courses
children.statusText: Not Satisfied: Complete the following courses:
children.description: CSCI-UA 101 - Introduction to Computer Science I CSCI-UA 102 - Introduction to Computer Science II CSCI-UA 201 - Computer Systems Org I CSCI-UA 202 - Computer Systems Org II CSCI-UA 310 - Basic Algorithms CSCI-UA 421 - Numerical Computing

children.title: Computer Science: Elective Courses
children.statusText: Satisfied: Complete 2 courses from: CSCI-UA 400-499
children.description: May replace 400 level courses with graduate courses, with permission of the department. Independent Study cannot be used for the elective area.

children.title: Mathematics: Required Courses
children.statusText: Satisfied: Complete the following courses:
children.description: MATH-UA 120 - Discrete Mathematics MATH-UA 121 - Calculus I OR MATH-UA 131 Mathematics for Economics I MATH-UA 325 - Advanced Calculus I OR MATH-UA 328 Honors Analysis I MATH-UA 343 - Algebra I OR MATH-UA 348 Honors Algebra I

children.title: Mathematics: Calculus Courses
children.statusText: Satisfied: Complete the following courses:
children.description: MATH-UA 122 - Calculus II OR MATH-UA 132 Mathematics for Economics II MATH-UA 123 - Calculus III OR MATH-UA 133 Mathematics for Economics III MATH-UA 140 Linear Algebra OR MATH-UA 148 Honors Linear Algebra

children.title: Mathematics: Advanced Courses
children.statusText: Satisfied: Complete two advanced Math courses; please see list on the department

children.title: Mathematics: Elective Courses
children.statusText: Satisfied: Complete one course by advisement.
